'''Relix''' were huge predatory fish indigenous to [[Maramere]]. It closely resembled the [[Opee sea killer/Legends|opee sea killer]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>. One attacked [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] while he was searching the ruins of the sunken ''[[Syren]]''.

{{Creature-stub}}

*[[Starfighter: Crossbones 2|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 2]] {{1st}}
